6 July 1952 12 June 2022 was a South Korean politician. A member of the Grand National Party , he served in the National Assembly from 2000 to 2012. 1 Kim died on 12 June 2022 at the age of 69. 2 References edit .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-2
